description_long: This modern house features a clean, geometric design with white exterior walls and a mix of flat and gable roofs. The property includes a spacious wooden deck, a rectangular swimming pool, and several outdoor lounge areas with sunbeds and umbrellas. The front of the house has a driveway leading to a single-car garage, bordered by manicured hedges and a paved walkway. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor spaces. The landscaping is enhanced by a few strategically placed trees and shrubs, adding greenery and privacy. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on open, functional living spaces and outdoor leisure.
description: A modern, white house with a mix of flat and gable roofs, large windows, a wooden deck, swimming pool, and attached garage, surrounded by manicured landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and a clear view of the pool and deck area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the house's gable roof profile, with less visibility of the pool.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the wooden deck, large sliding doors, and the pool area, with outdoor furniture visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the pool, deck, sunbeds, and the connection between the house and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with a small overhang, paved walkway, and minimal decorative elements, adjacent to the garage.
